# Study List Source

Legacy source material imported from:

<https://github.com/sujithgnth/study-list-learn-read-tech-guidlines>

The original nested `.git` directory was moved outside this repo to:

`/Users/sujeithgopinath/Personal/study-list-learn-read-tech-guidlines.git-backup`

Curated Markdown notes were moved into handbook folders such as
`coding-practices/`, `interviews/`, and `roadmaps/`.

Exact duplicate snapshots of existing handbook folders are kept locally under
this directory with `*-duplicate` names and ignored by Git. Prefer the existing
curated top-level folders instead.
